titleStmt.title: SII 19.328: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 328. (A.R. No. 325 of 1927.) TIRUPPURAMBIYAM, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE WEST WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, SĀKSHĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a gift of 2 mā and a kāṇi of land in Vānavanmādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Innambar-nāḍu on the northern bank of the river, for burning 1(1/2) perpetual lamps in the temple of Āditta-Īśvaram-Uḍaiyār at Tiruppurambiyam a dēvadāna separated from Aṇḍāṭṭu-kūṟṟam, by Śeṭṭi Perumāṉ of Maṇaṟkuḍi in Maṇaṛkuḍi-nāḍu also on the northern bank. This Maṇaṟkuḍi is probably the same as Maṇikkuḍi in the Kumbhakonam taluk. Vānavan-Mādēvi was a queen of Uttama Chōḻa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koppa
rakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 3
Āvatu vaṭakarai maṇaṟkuṭinā
(ṭiṉā)ṭṭu maṇaṟkuṭaiyāṉ ceṭ
ṭi perumāṉ vaṭakarai Aṇ
ṭāṭṭukkūṟṟattuniṉṟu ni
ṅkiya tevatāṉan ti
ruppuṟampiyattu śrī
tiruppuṟampiyamu
ṭaiya Ādittaīśvara
muṭaiyārkku śantrādi
ttaval niṟka vaitta no
ṉtāviḷakku Oṉṟarai
Ivvoṉṟarai viḷak
kukku vaitta Eṇṇai
Uḻakkarai Ivvuḻak
karai Eṇṇaikkum vai
tta nilam vaṭakarai I
ṉṉamparnāṭṭu brahma
deyam vāṉavaṉmātevicca
turvetimaṅkalattu Irācake
carivatikkuk kiḻakku tāmattuvāykkālukku vaṭakku
m Eḻāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu teṟkil nilam Iraṇṭu
māvaraiyil teṟkaṭaiya Iraṇṭu mākkāṇi
Iraṇṭu mākkāṇiyum
p panmāheśvarar rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.328 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
